query:
INSERT INTO players (userId, name, email, type, isPremium, lastActivityAt)
SELECT DISTINCT u.id, u.name, u.email, 'registered', COALESCE(u.isPremium, 0), NOW()
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN players p ON p.userId = u.id
WHERE p.id IS NULL
AND u.id IN (
  SELECT DISTINCT ts.userId FROM training_sets ts WHERE ts.userId IS NOT NULL
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT ch.userId FROM cycle_history ch WHERE ch.userId IS NOT NULL
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute INSERT INTO players (userId, name, email, type, isPremium, lastActivityAt)
SELECT DISTINCT u.id, u.name, u.email, 'registered', COALESCE(u.isPremium, 0), NOW()
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN players p ON p.userId = u.id
WHERE p.id IS NULL
AND u.id IN (
  SELECT DISTINCT ts.userId FROM training_sets ts WHERE ts.userId IS NOT NULL
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT ch.userId FROM cycle_history ch WHERE ch.userId IS NOT NULL
);
